What should have happened?

## Actual Behavior
What happened instead?

## Reproducibility
- [ ] Always

## Impact
- [ ] Blocking (cannot continue testing)

- [ ] Low (minor issue)

## Attachments
Add screenshots, console errors, sample files, or short recordings if available.

## Notes
Add any extra context, suspected cause, or workaround.

## Data Safety Check
- [ ] I exported a backup before testing this flow.
- [ ] This issue caused data loss.
